$comment: App-level settings. Copied to hub.local.json (gitignored) on first build; edit that. familyName fills the greeting; set showGreeting=false to hide it. theme must match a theme name from theme.local.css (e.g. 'hearth' or 'hearth-day'). showAssistant toggles the AI assistant feature — set false to disable it entirely (no orb, no Spacebar shortcut; the dashboard grid reclaims the space). showOrb hides just the orb while keeping the Spacebar shortcut active (only applies when showAssistant is true).
